markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on a new, design-centric content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Strategy:** Pivot from evergreen content to design-centric editorial guides to attract industrial designers and align with CEO Jordan's vision.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [**Immediate Action:** Publish all staged articles to build a data backlog for analysis. Discard 10 low-value listicles to focus resources.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Content Synergy:** Repurpose upcoming Vizcom University video tutorials into blog articles, creating a cohesive content ecosystem.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [**Visuals Upgrade:** Maura will create a Figma library of Vizcom's brand visuals to guide GrowthX in improving blog imagery, which Marcel noted needs to be elevated.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)

## Topics

### New Content Strategy

  - [A CEO-level discussion (Jordan & Marcel) prompted a strategic pivot to a more design-centric content voice.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [**Goal:** Attract industrial designers, support Vizcom University, and secure CEO buy-in.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [**Focus:** Shift from general evergreen content to high-value editorial guides and "first principles" design topics.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [**Status:** Schema work is on hold while Carly develops the new strategy deck for Jordan's review.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)

### Execution Plan & Content Pipeline

  - [**Publishing:** Immediately publish all staged articles to build a data backlog for analysis and send positive traffic signals to Google.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Content Discard:** Discard 10 listicles in the "Ready to Review" status, as they don't fit the new strategic direction.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [**New Drafts:** 5 new drafts are due for Vizcom's review by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)

### Vizcom University & Content Synergy

  - [Vizcom University will become a hub for video tutorials, not just courses.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [A film studio is being built this Friday to support a regular video production cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [**Opportunity:** Repurpose video content into blog articles (e.g., quotes, summaries) to create a cohesive content ecosystem and maximize reach.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)

### Performance Data & Analysis

  - [Carly reviewed blog performance data (60-day window, Mon–Sun) filtered to GrowthX URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Metrics:** Organic, Referral, and "None" traffic sources are tracked.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
      - ["None" is included because it correlates with AEO traffic and provides cleaner data.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [**Engagement Rate (ER):**](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
      - [**Good:** \>50% (indicates users are scrolling, clicking, and navigating).](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
      - **[Low:](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)** \<25% (signals content may not be resonating).
  - [**Next Step:** Present this data to Jordan and Marcel once a larger data backlog is established to support the new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)

### Visuals & Brand Consistency

  - [Marcel noted that blog visuals need to be elevated to match Vizcom's high brand standards.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [**Challenge:** Vizcom's brand library is not yet complete.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [**Solution:** Maura will create a Figma file with available assets and a visual audit to guide GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)

### Technical Issue

  - [Kim requested the list of server-side loop errors from last week.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carly:**](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
      - [Finalize and present the new content strategy deck to Jordan.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
      - [Send the list of server-side loop errors and a basic fix guide to Kim.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [**Kim:**](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
      - [Publish all staged articles.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Review the 5 new drafts by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [**Maura:**](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
      - [Create a Figma file with brand visuals and a visual audit for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/5DePjx9x-Qq-9j3Cz7kBsnsGjfatCbg_?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
